excerpt:
"Let's keep it light and romantic?" "I'd rather make out or give you a hug!" Get ready to hear this a lot because every response leads to this. I wasn't even saying anything romantic and it gets in a paywall loop. What a waste of time. I realize this after 5 minutes, every time i go away for a while. You are trying too hard to monetize and chasing everyone away.
